reviewers.evidence: Seven test registrations cover FR-AITUI-003 AC-1..AC-6 and SEC-AITUI-002 AC-5: claude, codex, unmatched claudep, custom claudep, icon broadcast, idle typing invariant, and disabled/deleted null clearing.
Tests reuse existing in-process SessionManager, WorkspaceService, and RecoveryOptionService harnesses; no mocks or production implementation were added.
Test names include T-PH002-01 symbols for FR-AITUI-003 AC-1..AC-6 and SEC-AITUI-002 AC-5 matching sidecar test cases.
npm --prefix server test exits 1 with exactly 7 T-PH002-01 failures before T-PH002-02 metadata implementation.
